headline: CCJ, BWXT oversold. CCJ and PWR cooling below MA50. Entry window open.
marketContext: Cycle is in Transition / verification (confidence 81%) — posture is defensive — protect capital first. Fundamentals are running ahead of price in Gold & Silver — Correction Within a Structural Bull and AI Infrastructure Hardware — Rate Compression, Not Demand Break — the market's fear is the opportunity. Fed Hike Repricing — The Q3 Macro Axis, NAVN — Profitability Inflection, Parabolic Price is priced ahead of fundamentals — don't chase.
groupAContext: BWXT (RSI 39.1, -23.9% from peak), KTOS (RSI 42.9, -62.4% from peak), CLS (RSI 48.6, -23.9% from peak), GEV (RSI 51.6, -10.4% from peak) are cooling — early-entry thesis intact. KNSL is extended (RSI 64.1) — no new entry here, let momentum resolve. Best setup: BWXT at RSI 39.1 — -23.9% from 52-week high with narrative not yet priced by institutions.
groupBContext: CCJ (RSI 35.5) is technically oversold — historically a high-quality entry signal for moat names. PWR (RSI 43.3, -7% vs MA50), ETN (RSI 47.8, -2% vs MA50) are below MA50 with cooling RSI — approaching entry range. Highest conviction: AVGO (score 81) — use RSI and MA50 levels to time entry, not to validate the thesis.
